column2: Welcome to BlackICE for Hearts of Iron 3. If you are seeing this, you have clicked on the tutorial. This tutorial was a half-baked effort by Paradox to inform about basic mechanics. BlackICE changes so much, it makes this tutorial effectively pointless. If you want to see it, load vanilla and play it there.
